ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of document */,
  "certification_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the certification status of the document */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options for the document (e.g., Attach) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who owns the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the document */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the document */,
  "encryption_key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the encryption key used for the document */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the document is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_certification_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_status_id") REFERENCES certification_statuses ("certification_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_encryption_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("encryption_key_id") REFERENCES encryption_keys ("encryption_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "document_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the document type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certification_statuses" (
  "certification_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification status */,
  "certification_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the certification status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the certification status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the certification status */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the certification status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the file is attached to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the file */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the file */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file for integrity checks */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., approval, rejection) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the client */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the client */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encryption_keys" (
  "encryption_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encryption key */,
  "key_value" TEXT /* Value of the encryption key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the key */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the key */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encryption_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encryption_keys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encryption_keys_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
